ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Good response, but could be more natural in tone to match the persona of a strict guardian.

ratings.overall_quality: 3 Short Note: The response is relevant to both context and persona, maintains consistency with an old royal guard's suspicion of strangers but lacks naturalness in tone.
